rationale: The imminent US-Iran deal and continued Israel-Lebanon strikes are the most relevant new developments for Poland, as they affect energy prices and regional stability; Khamenei's death adds a qualitative shift to the Iran situation.

top_events.title: Iran deal near as Khamenei dies, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei has died and a US-Iran deal is reportedly close, which could ease energy market tensions relevant to Polish consumers. Lebanon fighting continues despite deal proximity.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended for foreign nationals by US order
top_events.summary: US government orders Anthropic to disable AI tools for foreign nationals, a policy with indirect implications for EU tech and digital economy access. Limited direct impact on Polish daily life.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues without qualitative change
top_events.summary: The war on Poland's eastern border continues at background level with no new escalation reported this cycle. Baseline decays further.
